subject: Cloud Computing
title: PaaS: Just Deploy Your Code
description: Learn PaaS: Just Deploy Your Code in one minute.

hook.text: What if you could push code and it just runs — no servers to configure, no OS to patch?

buildup.text: PaaS handles the infrastructure. You provide the application code, and the platform does the rest.

discovery.text: Heroku popularized PaaS in 2007. Push your code with git and your app is live in seconds.

twist.text: PaaS is magical until you need something custom. Then the platform's constraints become your cage.

climax.text: PaaS is perfect for teams that want to build fast without infrastructure expertise.

punchline.text: PaaS hides the servers. You just ship the code.

quiz.question: What is the main advantage of PaaS over IaaS?
options: Developers deploy code without managing servers or operating systems
PaaS is always cheaper than IaaS
PaaS provides physical hardware for customers to customize
